researchTasks.task: GitHub repos with bounty labels (last 7 days)

researchTasks.note: 404 on /discover, but hub confirmed operational - Nokia acquisition

items.description: Build an analytics dashboard tracking bounty trends, payout distribution, contributor metrics

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T3: Full Autonomous Bounty-Hunting Agent
items.description: Build a fully autonomous multi-agent system that finds bounties, analyzes requirements

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T2: Discord Bot for Bounty Notifications
items.description: Build a Discord bot that posts new bounties to a channel, displays live leaderboard

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T2: AI Bounty Description Enhancer
items.description: Build an AI agent that analyzes vague bounty descriptions and generates improved versions

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T2: Interactive Bounty Flow Diagram Component
items.description: Build a React component showing the bounty lifecycle flow (post → claim → work → review → payout)

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T2: Advanced Bounty Search with Filters
items.description: Build advanced search and filtering capabilities for bounties

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T2: Add Bounty Comments/Discussion Thread
items.description: Add comment and discussion functionality to bounties

items.issue: 🏭 Bounty T1: Bounty Countdown Timer Component
items.description: Create a countdown timer component showing time remaining until bounty deadline

leads.whatTheyNeed: Multiple React/TypeScript frontend devs, backend devs, AI/agent developers, Discord bot developers
leads.howToReach: GitHub Issues - comment on issue to claim, or open PR directly
leads.expectedBudget: 100K-1M $FNDRY per bounty (crypto token, not USD - do your own price research)

items.description: Suggestion-based bounty for game feature development

leads.whatTheyNeed: Telegram bot developers, game feature developers

leads.description: TypeScript tooling for Ethereum. Used by Uniswap, Coinbase, Stripe, ENS, Optimism, Polymarket, and more.
leads.whatTheyNeed: Open source contributors for Ethereum TypeScript tools
leads.howToReach: GitHub Sponsors page - sponsor them to connect, or open issues/PRs

leads.description: Ecosystem of pocket-sized computers equipped with sensors for rapid prototyping and programming
leads.whatTheyNeed: Hardware firmware developers, embedded systems programmers

leads.description: SteamDB and various open source projects - highly visible in gaming/dev community
leads.whatTheyNeed: Contributors to SteamDB and related open source tools

leads.description: RapidAPI (now Nokia API Hub) has rolled out MCP (Model Context Protocol) functionality across the hub. They support Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, and VSCode MCP integrations.
leads.whatTheyNeed: API developers to publish on their platform, MCP server integrations
leads.opportunity: Build MCP connectors for popular APIs - there's likely demand for no-code/low-code API integration wrappers
leads.expectedBudget: Platform revenue share - API providers set pricing

leads.description: Nokia's programmable networks API - 5G network APIs for developers
leads.whatTheyNeed: Developers to build on network APIs
leads.opportunity: Novel category - could be first mover in network API integrations

research2_notes: Most freelance platform sites (Toptal, gun.io, lotusdev.io, remoteOK) were blocked/gated in this session
Product Hunt and RapidAPI discovery pages heavily Cloudflare-protected
GitHub is the most reliably accessible source via Playwright
Try next session: gun.io (freelance matching platform), lotusdev.io (new dev platform), remoteOK jobs
notes: GitHub bounty labels search returned 8942 results - SolFoundry/solfoundry is the most active bounty program with fresh issues from April 4 2026
Product Hunt is Cloudflare-blocked - could try with a real browser next time
RapidAPI was acquired by Nokia - brand transitioning, may have new opportunities as 'Nokia API Hub'
MCP (Model Context Protocol) is a hot category - RapidAPI supports it natively for Claude, Cursor, VSCode
GitHub Sponsors has 25 sponsored developers/organizations visible - good outreach targets for maintainer relationships
RapidAPI /discover page returns 404 - the API Hub is the new discovery surface
SolFoundry bounties pay in $FNDRY token - check token price/TVL before committing significant time
actionItems: Claim 1-2 SolFoundry bounties that match skillset (React frontend tasks are most accessible)
Build an MCP connector for a popular API on RapidAPI - first-mover advantage in emerging category
Reach out to wevm (Ethereum TypeScript tools) for contribution opportunities - high-visibility project
Monitor GitHub search 'label:bounty is:issue created:>2026-03-29' daily for new bounties
Try Product Hunt with full Playwright browser (Cloudflare challenge needs solving)
Explore gun.io for vetted freelance dev opportunities
Check lotusdev.io - appeared to be a new dev platform (connection closed - may be temporary)
RapidAPI is now Nokia API Hub - brand transition may create confusion/opportunity for early movers

summary.mostAccessible: SolFoundry T1/T2 bounties (React frontend, open race format)
summary.emergingCategory: MCP (Model Context Protocol) connectors for APIs - RapidAPI Nokia hub
summary.bestForQuickWin: Bounty Countdown Timer Component (T1, 100K $FNDRY, open race)
summary.longTermPlay: Build MCP connector for popular API on Nokia RapidAPI hub
